text: Moving from a glass-walled room filled with people engrossed in their work to a vividly colored exhibition about research and development, I feel an intriguing shift. The first space pulses with focused energy and silent collaboration—a community in the midst of creation. Now, surrounded by the bold graphics and displays of innovation, I sense the pulse of curiosity and possibility. Here, the boundary between thinker and observer blurs; I feel simultaneously inspired, reflective, and eager to question the relationship between knowledge and its expression in space.
